name: Shepherd's Pie #2
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Hot Italian Sausages (cut in half and sliced 1/4 inch thick)
2 lb Potatoes (pare and cut into 1 inch chunks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hot Italian sausages lengthwise in half and slice them 1/4 inch thick.
2. Peel and cut the potatoes into 1 inch chunks.
3. In a medium skillet, cook ground beef and sausages over medium high heat until meat loses some of its pink color and releases juices. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, garlic, and vinegar. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally and breaking up tomatoes for about 10 minutes.
4. Stir in peas, chopped fresh basil, 1/2 tsp salt, oregano, and pepper. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
5. Boil the potatoes in water until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain the potatoes and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
6. Beat milk, grated Parmesan cheese, butter, remaining 1/2 tsp salt, and pepper into the potatoes until smooth.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Spoon the meat mixture into two quart shallow casserole dishes.
9. Spread the potato mixture evenly on top of the meat mixture.
10. Bake in the preheated oven for about 45-50 minutes, or until golden and bubbling.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
